title: We have to put WORLD Channel in Guai Lo position

replies.msg:
Hi. I wanna throw a brick.

As most foreigners don’t get an account, it’s better to categorise posts so as to avoid needless troubles:

(1) New - showing the latest post
(2) Hot - showing current hot topics
(3) Fact-checked - showing informative post

(1) and (2), it’s mostly like 吹水台 as a platform for any kind of discussion. Pro-CCP army is also welcomed but please don’t ruin this beautiful forum. Make a real interactive connection with the world.

(3), u can take it as Editors’ Pick. Just like how LIHKG Instagram story works. Picking those informative posts which are provided with videos/images for fact check. Threshold needs further discussion though.

Sorry for my broken English.
Anyone gonna give out some jade?

Pro-CCP army is also welcomed but please don’t ruin this beautiful forum.


nice, welcome to the land of freedom
pro-China people, enjoy ur breath here and take the opportunity to explore what human rights really are.

Five demands, not one less.
Fight for freedom, stand with Hong Kong.
